## Why It Matters

This page defines what the `fumadocs-ui` layer is for: the default docs theme, bundled layouts, and interactive components. That is directly relevant to the repo's docs app because it explains where the ready-made docs chrome and component set come from.

## Key Excerpts

> "Fumadocs UI offers a beautifully designed theme for documentation sites."

> "It is bundled with many interactive components & layouts for docs sites..."

> "You can also use Fumadocs CLI to install the components locally and have full control."

## Capture Notes

- The fetched page is a short overview page rather than a detailed API reference.
- The main signal is architectural: Fumadocs ships a default theme, but components can be copied in locally for customization.
- This note is intentionally concise because the upstream page itself is concise.
